== Notes for [[Item:Q112479|Q112479]] ==

-https://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/GASCONY.htm#AcibellaGascogneMGalindoAznarAragon

5. ''' ACIBELLA de Gascogne '''(-before 905). The Codex de Roda names "domna Acibella, Garsea Sanzionis comitis Guasconie filia" as the first wife of "Galindo Asnari"[126].

'''m''' as his first wife, GALINDO II Aznar Conde de Aragón, son of AZNAR II Galíndez Conde de Aragón & his wife Oneca Garcés de Pamplona (-923).

-----




Acibella Garcés de Gascuña

Father García Sánchez "le Courbe"1 b. circa 870, d. 924

Mother Aminiana (?)1 b. circa 865

Acibella Garcés de Gascuña was the daughter of García Sánchez "le Courbe" and Aminiana (?).1 Acibella Garcés de Gascuña married Galindo II Aznárez, conde de Aragón, son of Aznar II Galíndez, conde de Aragón and Oneca Garcés de Navarra, before 890; His 2nd.1

Family

Galindo II Aznárez, conde de Aragón b. circa 870, d. between 920 and 922

Child

Toda Galíndez de Aragón+ b. b 8902

Citations

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 290-38.

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 290-37.
--------------------
Galindo Aznárez I

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Galindo Aznárez was married to Guldreguda, and had one son, Aznar Galíndez II, his successor.
--------------------

SOURCE NOTES:
www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/cgi-bin/gedlkup/n=royal?royal11121

RESEARCH NOTES:
2 children

SOURCE NOTES:
www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/cgi-bin/gedlkup/n=royal?royal11123

Infanta de Navarra

RESEARCH NOTES:
2 husbands, 5 children

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Of Gascony

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Of Gascony

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Of Navarre

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
